/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpars_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libpars_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/pars_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/pars_msgs/msg/data__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pars_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/pars_msgs/msg/target__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/bridges/jetson_workspace/build/pars_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/install/lib: libpars_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/install/lib
